"CVSS:4.0/AV:L/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-770", "name": "Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling"}], "description": "## Impact

Multiple Code Paths Missing Base64 Pre-Allocation Size Checks.

Several base64 decode paths could allocate before enforcing decoded-size limits.

OpenClaw is a user-controlled local assistant. This advisory is scoped to the OpenClaw trust model and does not assume a multi-tenant service boundary.

## Affected Packages / Versions

- Package: `openclaw` (npm)
- Affected versions: `<=v2026.4.2`
- Patched versions: `2026.4.8`

## Fix

The issue was fixed on `main` and is available in the patched npm version listed above. The verified fixed tree is commit `d7c3210cd6f5fdfdc1beff4c9541673e814354d5`.

## Verification

The fix was re-checked against `main` before publication, including targeted regression tests for the affected security boundary.

## Credits

Thanks @zsxsoft and @KeenSecurityLab for reporting.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00302, "percentile": 0.21619}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-ccx3-fw7q-rr2r", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-09T17:37:20Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-ccx3-fw7q-rr2r", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-ccx3-fw7q-rr2r"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42420"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-28T19:37:45Z", "published_at": "2026-04-09T17:37:20Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-ccx3-fw7q-rr2r", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42420", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/d7c3210cd6f5fdfdc1beff4c9541673e814354d5", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-improper-base64-decoding-size-validation", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-ccx3-fw7q-rr2r"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-ccx3-fw7q-rr2r", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Multiple Code Paths Missing Base64 Pre-Allocation Size Checks", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-06T02:41:31Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-ccx3-fw7q-rr2r", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.8", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.4.8"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
